use_cases: Add a custom animated cursor to portfolio or creative websites for enhanced visual appeal
Replace default browser cursor with a styled pointer for branding purposes
Create interactive hover effects with custom cursor rendering in creative tools
Build premium-feeling UI experiences with custom cursor tracking
ai_summary: A custom pointer component that creates an animated cursor effect on hover. Uses motion/react for smooth animations and tracks mouse position to render a custom cursor. The component adds cursor-none to the parent element and displays an animated pointer when the user hovers, making it ideal for creative portfolios, SaaS products, and developer tools seeking a polished, interactive feel.
